layout.layout_rhythm: sakura-chroma: medium density, low formality. Vintage Japanese cassette-package aesthetic: cream paper, diagonal rainbow ribbons, condensed bold type, JIS-style spec checkboxes.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"frame_inset": "clamp(36px, 3.6vw, 72px)", "frame_inset_bottom": "clamp(72px, 7vh, 110px)", "topbar_gap": "clamp(12px, 1.4vh, 22px)", "card_pad_x": "clamp(14px, 1.4vw, 20px)", "card_pad_y": "clamp(16px, 1.7vw, 24px)", "

template_json_typography.style: condensed black grotesk display in red and brown for hero type, paired with a clean modern sans for body and a mono for spec-sheet listings; Japanese kanji used as decorative micro-type

design_tokens_typography.style: condensed black grotesk display in red and brown for hero type, paired with a clean modern sans for body and a mono for spec-sheet listings; Japanese kanji used as decorative micro-type

typography.typography_role: condensed black grotesk display in red and brown for hero type, paired with a clean modern sans for body and a mono for spec-sheet listings; Japanese kanji used as decorative micro-type

design_intent_font_pairing: LXGW WenKai for these characters so they read as Chinese rather than as a Japane
cjk_policy.known_degradation: ZCOOL XiaoWei is a single-weight face — there is no 900-equivalent. The Big Shoulders 900-weight loudness that defines the Latin display voice cannot be exactly matched. Compensate by reserving CJK display for moments where the soft elegance is welcome (cover spreads, quote slides) rather than where pure brutalist weight is needed (hero stats). For hero nume

template_json_palette.description: warm cream paper canvas with dark warm-brown ink and a six-colour primary palette (red, pink, orange, yellow, green, blue) used as bold flat blocks, ribbons, and product-strip accents

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: distinctive display face may be approximated by Slide/Source/思源 fonts; preserve weight/size/case first
italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Big Shoulders Display 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Albert Sans 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

paragraph_spacing: "clamp(12px, 1.4vh, 22px)" card-pad-x: "clamp(14px, 1.4vw, 20px)" card-pad-y: "clamp(16px, 1.7vw, 24px)" grid-gap: "clamp(16px, 1.6vw, 26px)" col-gap: "clamp(28px, 3vw, 56px)" pagenum-inset: "clamp(20px, 2.2vh, 36px) clamp(24px, 2.2vw, 44px)" canvas: width: 100vw height: 100vh components: paper-texture: backgroundImage: "radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, rgba(58,37,22,0.55) 1px, transparent 1.6px)" backgroundSize: "4px 4px" opacity: 0.16 zIndex: 1 description: "Subtle 4px-period halftone-dot paper texture sitting over every slide stage at 16% opacity. Drawn as a 1px-period radial-gradient. Required — it is the paper-grain that anchors every flat color block in the print register." petals-cluster: description: "A decorative cluster of 4–5 overlapping perfect circles (each `aspect-ratio: 1/1, border-radius: 50%`) in the primary palette colors. Circles overlap and tile within a bounded container. Used as a brand mark, decorative anchor in slide corners, or quote-page ornament." ribbon-band: height: "clamp(40px, 6vh, 96px)" width: "160% (oversize so rotation clears the frame)" transform: "rotate(-22deg) or rotate(22deg)" description: "A bundle of 5 stacked solid-color horizontal bars (pink, orange, yellow, green, blue) rotated -22° or +22° to sweep diagonally across a region. Echoes the cassette-label color-stripe motif. Anchored to one edge of the slide and bleeds off the opposite edge." ribbon-single: height: "16–18%" width: "160%" transform: "rotate(±22deg)" description: "A single solid-color ribbon in a multi-color stack
text_direction: column-reverse means the first segment in source order sits at the BOTTOM of the column, and lit segments stack upward like a real VU level meter. flex:1 makes all 6 segments share the column's available height. */ flex: 1 1 0

text_transform_policy.raw_value: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation - No period on display headlines - Pangu spacing (盘古之白): `使用 Claude` not `使用Claude` - One font per sentence ### Aesthetic Notes for This System - **The negative tracking on Big Shoulders display (-0.012em to -0.025em) must drop to 0** on CJK. ZCOOL XiaoWei is already a condensed face; uppercase

line_height_scale.raw_value: tight on display (0.84–0.94), generous on body (1.4–1.5), tight on micro and mono (1.0–1.3). Inverting these breaks the rhythm. ## Layout ### Canvas System The system targets `100vw × 100vh`. The deck is wrapped in a `.deck` grid with a centered `.stage` filling the viewport. Each `.slide` is absolutely positioned inset 0 with opacity 0; body 1.75–1.85, display 1.15–1.25 - Letter-spacing: 0 on CJK - Text-transform: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation - No period on display headlines - P

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe
